name: Space Coast Credit Union | Calle Ocho | Miami, FL
description_short: Space Coast Credit Union's Calle Ocho branch in Miami offers full-service banking including checking, savings, mortgages, auto loans, and credit cards with extended hours and drive-thru service.
description_long: Space Coast Credit Union (SCCU) is a federally insured credit union operating multiple branches throughout Florida, with the Calle Ocho location serving the Miami area. The Calle Ocho branch is positioned as a comprehensive financial services hub offering retail banking products and lending solutions to members in the southwestern Miami community. SCCU provides a traditional credit union model combining member-owned structure with a broad range of consumer financial products. The organization operates with accessibility features and maintains multiple service channels including in-person banking, drive-thru, and digital platforms. The Calle Ocho branch offers extensive banking services including checking accounts (Free, Interest-bearing, Student, and Health Savings options), savings products (Regular Savings, Money Market, My Way Savings, Christmas Club), certificates of deposit, and IRA accounts. Lending products span mortgages (conventional, FHA, VA, construction-to-permanent, no down payment, jumbo, condo, and refinance options), home equity products (loans and lines of credit), auto loans with pre-approval and refinance options, recreational vehicle and boat financing, motorcycle loans, personal loans, and credit cards (multiple Visa tiers). Digital services include online banking, mobile banking with mobile deposit, digital wallet functionality, and Zelle money transfer integration. Key distinguishing features include drive-thru ATMs with deposit-taking capability, walk-up ATMs, safe deposit boxes, coin sorters, and an appointment scheduling system. The branch maintains extended hours (9 AM-5 PM Monday-Thursday, 9 AM-6 PM Friday for lobby; 8 AM-6 PM Monday-Friday and 9 AM-1 PM Saturday for drive-thru). SCCU emphasizes accessibility with AudioEye toolbar integration and participates in shared branching networks for members needing out-of-area service. The organization offers specialized loan programs including "Hero Loans" and carries third-party insurance products (TruStage Auto & Home Insurance, credit life and disability insurance). The Calle Ocho location represents a mid-sized credit union branch with competitive product offerings and reasonable operating hours. Credit union membership requirements and eligibility criteria are not addressed on this location page. The organization's accessibility focus and extended drive-thru hours are practical advantages for working professionals and those with mobility considerations. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Extended drive-thru hours (8 AM-6 PM weekdays, 9 AM-1 PM Saturdays) accommodating working schedules
Multiple ATM types available including walk-up, drive-thru deposit-taking, and coin sorting machines
Comprehensive mortgage options including no down payment, no closing costs, VA, FHA, and construction-to-permanent loans
Digital services including mobile deposit, Zelle integration, and digital wallet functionality
Safe deposit boxes and appointment scheduling available at the branch
Accessible website with AudioEye toolbar for vision-impaired users
Participation in shared branching network allowing members to conduct transactions at cooperative locations statewide
cons: Website lacks specific rate information, APRs, or fee schedules for any products
No member review data, satisfaction metrics, or transparency about service quality standards provided
Limited information about membership eligibility requirements and application process on location page
Drive-thru hours end at 6 PM weekdays (not 24-hour availability) limiting emergency access
Lobby hours are standard business hours (9-5 M-Th, 9-6 F) with no evening weekday service
best_for: Miami-area residents seeking full-service credit union banking with extended drive-thru hours
First-time homebuyers interested in FHA, VA, or no down payment mortgage options
Credit union members already established with SCCU needing branch services in southwestern Miami
Professionals with daytime work schedules valuing Saturday morning drive-thru availability
diagnosis: Space Coast Credit Union's Calle Ocho branch is best suited for Miami residents already using SCCU or those seeking a full-service credit union with convenient drive-thru hours and comprehensive mortgage options. The main caveat is that the website provides no pricing, rates, or competitive fee data—prospective members must contact the branch directly or call (305) 882-5000 to compare terms against other Florida financial institutions.
services: Free Checking, Interest Checking, Student Checking, Health Savings Checking accounts
Regular Savings, Money Market, My Way Savings, Christmas Club Savings, Youth Savings accounts
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) and IRA accounts with CD options
Conventional, FHA, VA, jumbo, condo, and construction-to-permanent mortgages
No Down Payment Home Loans and No Closing Costs Home Loans
Home Equity Loans, Home Equity Lines of Credit (HELOC), and Fixed-Rate Home Equity Loans
Auto loans with pre-approval and refinance options, plus boat, RV, and motorcycle financing
Personal loans including signature loans and share/CD-secured loans with skip-a-payment options
Visa credit cards in multiple tiers (Signature, Platinum, Low Rate, Secured, Student)
Digital banking services including online banking, mobile banking, mobile deposit, and Zelle transfers
Safe deposit boxes, drive-thru deposit ATMs, walk-up ATMs, and coin sorters
TruStage Auto & Home Insurance, credit life insurance, and disability insurance products
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: Space Coast Credit Union's Calle Ocho branch offers checking, savings, mortgages, auto loans, and credit cards with extended hours.
